name: knowledge-base-skill-kit
description: Five skills for building and maintaining a persistent, interlinked knowledge base — creation wizard, import orchestrator, graph-traversal query engine, health-check maintenance, and structural evolution.

skills.name: kb-create
skills.description: Guided wizard that scaffolds a new personal knowledge base — interactively defines purpose, entities, concepts, import procedures, and folder structure.

skills.name: kb-import
skills.description: Processes a source into the KB wiki using the appropriate import procedure, creates/updates wiki pages, cross-links, and syncs the search index.

skills.name: kb-query
skills.description: Graph-traversal query engine that finds entry points via filesystem scan and qmd, walks wikilink connections to gather context, and synthesizes answers grounded in the graph.

skills.name: kb-maintain
skills.description: Health-check pass — finds orphans, contradictions, stale pages, and uses graph algorithms to predict missing connections.

skills.name: kb-evolve
skills.description: Structural evolution — add new import procedures, update the CONSTITUTION, restructure wiki folders, merge or split pages, and extend tooling.

required.name: qmd
required.description: Local hybrid search engine (BM25 + vector + LLM re-ranking)

recommended.name: qmd-skill
recommended.description: Companion skill that teaches the agent how to use qmd
